description_long: This object depicts an elderly person with exaggeratedly elongated limbs and a highly stylized, contorted body posture. The figure is dressed in a black suit with a white shirt and red tie, and has a head of short, curly gray hair. The face is detailed with glasses and pronounced facial features, including visible wrinkles and a neutral expression. The arms and legs are unnaturally stretched and bent, giving the figure a surreal, almost abstract appearance. The overall form is dynamic, with limbs splayed outward and the body twisted, suggesting motion or an unusual pose. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with the clothing and skin rendered in distinct, contrasting colors.
description: A surreal elderly person in a black suit with elongated limbs, gray curly hair, and glasses, posed in a highly contorted, dynamic stance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the elderly person's face, glasses, and the dramatic extension of both arms and legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme length of the arms and the profile of the head with visible glasses and hair.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizing the back of the suit, the curvature of the limbs, and the back of the head with curly gray hair.
description_view_3: Oblique rear view showing the twisted posture, the back of the suit, and the extended limbs from a different angle.
attribute_clothing_style: Formal black suit with a white shirt and red tie, no visible patterns or accessories beyond glasses.
attribute_posture: Highly contorted, with limbs stretched and bent in an exaggerated, dynamic pose.
attribute_facial_features: Glasses, pronounced wrinkles, and a neutral expression.
